rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARIA A. GRIJALVA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Business Subpoenas; Memo Of Points & Authorities; Supporting Declarations
rulings.Rulings: Matter on Calendar for Thursday, July 27, 2006. Respondents Nelson and Bianca Grijalva's motion to quash subpoenas to Old Republic Title Company, Fidelity National Title Company, HSBC Mortgage Corporation, and North American Mortgage. The motion is denied. The records are to be produced within 14 days of notice of this order subject to the following conditions: respondents' social security numbers, dates of birth, and credit card numbers shall be redacted. Any tax returns submitted in support of any application or account shall not be produced. Lastly, the parties are ordered to meet and confer as to entering into a stipulated protective order limiting disclosure to Petitioner and his counsel and agents and providing that any information obtained only be used for purposes of the present litigation. = (610/BEC)
